title: taraxacum sublimiforme
intro: Taraxacum sublimiforme is a species of dandelion, a flowering plant with medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used to treat digestive issues, such as constipation, and to support liver function due to its bitter compounds. The plant is also believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate conditions like arthritis and eczema. Taraxacum sublimiforme can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and its roots and leaves are often used in herbal remedies.
